diagrams.title: If-Else Flowchart
diagrams.description: Shows the control flow of an if-else statement with diamond-shaped decision box and two branches for true and false outcomes
diagrams.purpose: Visualizes how program execution branches based on condition evaluation

diagrams.title: Else-If Ladder Flow
diagrams.description: Illustrates the sequential checking of multiple conditions in an else-if ladder, showing how conditions are evaluated top-down until a match is found
elements: Respective Action Blocks for Each Condition
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrates the cascading nature of else-if statements and how only one block executes

diagrams.title: Truth Value Table in C
diagrams.description: Shows how different values are interpreted as true or false in C conditions
diagrams.purpose: Clarifies common misconception about truth values and helps write correct conditions
